ddls:
CREATE TABLE "foia_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FOIA request */,
  "request_number" TEXT /* Official request number assigned to the FOIA request */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office handling the FOIA request */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the FOIA request was submitted */,
  "date_closed" TEXT /* Date the FOIA request was closed */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the FOIA request */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the FOIA request (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exemption applied, if any */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requester of the FOIA request */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the FOIA request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foia_requests_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foia_requests_exemption_id FOREIGN KEY ("exemption_id") REFERENCES exemptions ("exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foia_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES requesters ("requester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foia_requests_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES request_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exemption */,
  "exemption_code" TEXT /* Code representing the exemption (e.g., (b)(5)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the exemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the request status (e.g., Open, Closed, Withdrawn) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office handling FOIA requests */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requesters" (
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requester */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the requester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the requester */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the requester is associated with, if applicable */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the requester */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the requester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_times" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FOIA request being processed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date processing of the request started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date processing of the request ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of processing in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_times_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original FOIA request */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was filed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for filing the appeal */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the appeal (e.g., granted, denied) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal decision was made */,
  "decision_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the appeal decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FOIA request */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the communication (e.g., sent, received) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FOIA request */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attached document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_records" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FOIA request */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for processing the request */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "receipt_number" TEXT /* Receipt number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_records_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the staff belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in FOIA processing */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member's supervisor */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member joined the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FOIA request that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Staff member who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the request */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)
